description: Set yourself free with this Groversons Miss T moulded bra. Seamless comfort that'll make you feel liberated and confident. Move about as you wish, it's perfect to wear under t-shirts, close fitting tops and salwar kameez. Now let the world try and keep up with you. Made of breathable fabric for enhanced comfort Moulded seamless padded cups and complete coverage for extra grip and control Crafted from lace Beautifully cushioned, adjustable straps with perfect stretch Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade
